word.hint_de: sachlich, z.B. in einem medizinischen Kontext

word.tr_en: holiday; day off; absence from work
examination paper; answer sheet; answer (to an exam question)

word.rem: appears in GENKI2 L20 as kakari no mono; difference to kata, hito?

sentence.s: 【一：いっ】【分：ぷん】の【差：さ】で【列：れっ】【車：しゃ】に【乗：の】り【遅：おく】れた。
sentence.rom: Ippun no sa de ressha ni nori-okureta.
sentence.tr_en: I missed the train by one minute.
sentence.tr_de: Ich habe den Zug um eine Minute verpasst.

word.tr_en: to eat; to live; to survive; to sting (as insects do); to tease; to torment; to make fun of; to eat into; to consume; to defeat a superior; to threaten a position
field; hidden (structural) member; wild; lacking a political post
(in) the middle of; (in) the midst of; (in) the course of; (at) the height of
end; tip; top; end (of the year, month, etc.); close; youngest child; descendants; offspring; posterity; future; (finally) after; (at last) after; at the end of; trifles; trivialities; degenerate age
root (of a plant); root (of a tooth, hair, etc.); center (of a pimple, etc.); root (of all evil, etc.); source; origin; cause; basis; one's true nature; (fishing) reef; Ne; Root
depending on; as soon as; immediately (upon); in accordance with; order; program; programme; precedence; circumstances; course of events; reason
table; chart; list; memorial to an emperor
nakedness; nudity; bareness; nakedness; baldness; being uncovered
estimate; guess; conjecture; aim; direction; bearings; registration mark (printing); approximately; about; around

upper reaches (of a river); upper stream; top; upper part; upper half (of the body); long ago; beginning; first; person of high rank (e.g. the emperor); government; imperial court; imperial capital (i.e. Kyoto); capital region (i.e. Kansai); region (or direction of) the imperial palace; head (of a table); wife; mistress (of a restaurant)

from the standpoint of; as a matter of (e.g. fact); in the field of; being of the type of; aboard (a ship or vehicle); on top of; on; above; first volume (e.g. book); superior quality; best; top; high class; going up; governmental; imperial; presenting; showing; ana-
lowness (of degree, value, etc.); inferiority; second volume (of two); third volume (of three)
lower reaches (of a river); bottom; lower part; lower half (of the body, esp. the privates); faeces; dirty (e.g. dirty jokes, etc.)
world; society; people; the public; Loka
used; second-hand; old; Middle Ages (in Japan esp. Heian period)

race (of people); type of person; Race (human classification)

number (in a series); (one's) turn; watch; guard; lookout; rank; standing; position; bout; match; pieces (in a collection)

second (unit of time); arc second; Second
end (e.g. of street); tip; point; edge; margin; beginning; start; first; odds and ends; scrap; odd bit; least
flute; fife; pipe; recorder; flageolet; shakuhachi; clarinet; whistle; Flute
mind; spirit; soul; heart; ethos; attitude; mentality; will; intention; spirit (of a matter); essence; fundamental significance; Spirit
string; cord; man who is financially dependent on a woman; gigolo; pimp; restrictions; conditions; mantle (shellfish, etc.); small intestine (beef, pork); oviduct meat (chicken); Twine
event; affair; incident; case; plot; trouble; scandal
darn it!; darn!; oops!; oh dear!; oh no!
friend; companion; comrade; pal; accompaniment; companion (e.g. book); complement; accessory

section (i.e. of text); sentence; passage; paragraph; phrase; verse (of 5 or 7 mora in Japanese poetry; of 4, 5, or 7 characters in Chinese poetry); haiku; first 17 morae of a renga, etc.; maxim; saying; idiom; expression; Phrase
expert; learned person; doctor; PhD; Dr.; instructor at the imperial court (ritsuryo period); pitch and length marks (to accompany a Buddhist liturgical chant, etc.); Doctor (title)
mark; sign; symbol; emblem; badge; crest; flag; evidence; proof; token (of gratitude, affection, etc.)
stop (bus, tram, etc.); station; stopping place
name; given name; title; fame; renown; reputation; pretext; pretense; justification; appearance
facing; opposite; across the street; other side
good; goodness; right; virtue; Good and evil
National Diet; legislative assembly of Japan (1947-); Imperial Diet; legislative assembly of Japan (1889-1947); legislative assembly; parliament; congress
national language; Japanese language (often as a school subject in Japan); native Japanese words (as opposed to loanwords); National language

local specialty or souvenir bought as a gift while travelling; present brought by a visitor; something unpleasant that one is given (e.g. an illness while on vacation); unwelcome gift; disservice; Souvenir
earth; ground; land; soil; place; territory
house; home; one's house; one's home; one's husband
fixed period; fixed term; regular; periodic; periodical; fixed-term commuter pass; fixed-term deposit; futures contracts
well; properly; suitably; best regards; please remember me; please treat me favorably (favourably); please take care of; please do; just like ...; as though one were ...; by all means; of course
as a matter of fact; by the way; to tell you the truth; to be honest; frankly
practicality; practical; reality; actuality; actual conditions; bhutakoti (limit of reality)
tower; steeple; spire; stupa; pagoda; dagoba; Tower
border; boundary; turning point; watershed; area; region; spot; space; environment; psychological state; mental state; cognitive object; something perceptible by the sense organs or mind

nest; rookery; breeding place; hive; den; haunt; (spider's) web; Nest

turn (in line); order of things; sequential order
